name: Nintendo Switch

bios.notes: Keys and firmware must be dumped by the user and must never be stored in project config, docs, examples, or chat.

frontend_notes.emudeck: Historical EmuDeck setups may still reference Yuzu; newer setups may use Ryujinx or forks. Verify active parser/emulator.

notes: Keys, firmware, account data, and installed content state must remain user-managed and outside rom-librarian data.

confidence_notes: Switch support and emulator availability are volatile; retain conservative metadata and verify the active frontend parser before suggesting changes.
notes: Never ask the user to paste keys. Only identify expected file locations and missing-file symptoms.
